units.source_text: 考慮到上表所載變動的相互關係，管理層估計使⽤價值的合理可能範圍介乎134億美元⾄310億美元之間（2024年：135億美元⾄308億美元），並
units.translation_target_text: Taking into account the interrelationship of the changes set out in the table above, management estimates that the reasonably possible range of value in use is between US$13.4 billion and US$31.0 billion (2024: US$13.5 billion to US$30.8 billion), and
units.translation_en: Taking into account the interrelationship of the changes set out in the table above, management estimates that the reasonably possible range of value in use is between US$13.4 billion and US$31.0 billion (2024: US$13.5 billion to US$30.8 billion), and

units.source_text: 確認集團投資的公允值於截⾄減值測試⽇期⽌過去五年介乎75億美元⾄131億美元之間。使⽤價值的可能範圍乃按上表所載中短期營運收益的有利
units.translation_target_text: The fair value of the Group's investments was confirmed to have ranged from US$7.5 billion to US$13.1 billion over the past five years to the date of the impairment test. The possible range of value in use is based on the favorable short- and medium-term operating income shown in the table above.
units.translation_en: The fair value of the Group's investments was confirmed to have ranged from US$7.5 billion to US$13.1 billion over the past five years to the date of the impairment test. The possible range of value in use is based on the favorable short- and medium-term operating income shown in the table above.

units.source_text: 集團於Saudi Awwal Bank（「SAB」）的投資分類為聯營公司。滙豐是SAB的最⼤股東，持有31%股權。滙豐透過在SAB董事會的代表，對該⾏發
units.translation_target_text: The Group's investment in Saudi Awwal Bank ("SAB") is classified as an associated company. HSBC is SAB's largest shareholder, holding 31% of the shares. HSBC, through its representation on the SAB board, issued a
units.translation_en: The Group's investment in Saudi Awwal Bank ("SAB") is classified as an associated company. HSBC is SAB's largest shareholder, holding 31% of the shares. HSBC, through its representation on the SAB board, issued a

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The Group's investment in Saudi Awwal Bank ("SAB") is classified as an associated company. HSBC is SAB's largest shareholder, holding 31% of the shares. HSBC, through its representation on the SAB board, issued a

units.source_text: 揮重⼤影響⼒。於聯營公司的投資根據IAS 28採⽤會計權益法確認，詳情請參閱前文有關交通銀⾏⼀節。
units.translation_target_text: exert significant influence. Investments in associates are recognized using the equity method of accounting in accordance with IAS 28. Please refer to the previous section on Bank of Communications for details.
units.translation_en: exert significant influence. Investments in associates are recognized using the equity method of accounting in accordance with IAS 28. Please refer to the previous section on Bank of Communications for details.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: exert significant influence. Investments in associates are recognized using the equity method of accounting in accordance with IAS 28. Please refer to the previous section on Bank of Communications for details.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 截⾄2025年12⽉31⽇，集團於SAB的投資公允值略低於賬⾯值。集團採⽤經使⽤價值計算法對賬⾯值進⾏減值測試，⽽根據使⽤價值計算法採⽤
units.translation_target_text: As of December 31, 2025, the fair value of the Group's investment in SAB was slightly lower than the book value. The Group uses the value-in-use calculation method to conduct impairment testing on the book value, while the value-in-use calculation method uses
units.translation_en: As of December 31, 2025, the fair value of the Group's investment in SAB was slightly lower than the book value. The Group uses the value-in-use calculation method to conduct impairment testing on the book value, while the value-in-use calculation method uses

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: As of December 31, 2025, the fair value of the Group's investment in SAB was slightly lower than the book value. The Group uses the value-in-use calculation method to conduct impairment testing on the book value, while the value-in-use calculation method uses

units.source_text: 折現現⾦流預測所得的可收回⾦額⾼於賬⾯值。SAB的利潤每年亦⾒增⻑。按此基準，集團認為並無減值跡象。
units.translation_target_text: The recoverable amount derived from the discounted cash flow forecast is higher than the book value. SAB's profits have also increased every year. On this basis, the Group believes that there is no indication of impairment.
units.translation_en: The recoverable amount derived from the discounted cash flow forecast is higher than the book value. SAB's profits have also increased every year. On this basis, the Group believes that there is no indication of impairment.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The recoverable amount derived from the discounted cash flow forecast is higher than the book value. SAB's profits have also increased every year. On this basis, the Group believes that there is no indication of impairment.

units.source_text: 使⽤價值計算法是基於管理層對根據IAS 36「資產減值」編製的普通股股東可獲未來盈利之最佳估計⽽作出。相關現⾦流乃運⽤基於SAB⽬前狀況
units.translation_target_text: The value-in-use calculation is based on management's best estimate of future earnings available to ordinary shareholders prepared in accordance with IAS 36 "Impairment of Assets". The relevant cash flows are based on SAB's current situation
units.translation_en: The value-in-use calculation is based on management's best estimate of future earnings available to ordinary shareholders prepared in accordance with IAS 36 "Impairment of Assets". The relevant cash flows are based on SAB's current situation

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The value-in-use calculation is based on management's best estimate of future earnings available to ordinary shareholders prepared in accordance with IAS 36 "Impairment of Assets". The relevant cash flows are based on SAB's current situation

units.source_text: 的估算所得，因此並不包含可能影響投資表現的未承諾未來⾏動所產⽣的預計現⾦流，⽽該等預計現⾦流在產⽣的時候於相關時間會予以考慮。
units.translation_target_text: Estimated income, therefore does not include expected cash flows from uncommitted future actions that may affect investment performance, and these expected cash flows will be considered at the relevant time when they are generated.
units.translation_en: Estimated income, therefore does not include expected cash flows from uncommitted future actions that may affect investment performance, and these expected cash flows will be considered at the relevant time when they are generated.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Estimated income, therefore does not include expected cash flows from uncommitted future actions that may affect investment performance, and these expected cash flows will be considered at the relevant time when they are generated.

units.source_text: 滙豐控股乃各附屬公司股權資本的主要提供者，有需要時亦會向該等附屬公司提供非股權資本。該等投資的資⾦⼤多數來⾃滙豐控股的股權及非股
units.translation_target_text: HSBC Holdings is the main provider of equity capital to its subsidiaries and will also provide non-equity capital to these subsidiaries when necessary. Most of the funds for these investments came from HSBC Holdings' equity and non-equity holdings.

units.source_text: 作為資本管理程序的⼀環，滙豐控股⼒求在本⾝資本組合成分及對各附屬公司的投資之間保持平衡。基於此原則，滙豐控股為該等投資提供資⾦的
units.translation_target_text: As part of its capital management process, HSBC seeks to maintain a balance between the composition of its own capital portfolio and its investments in subsidiaries. Based on this principle, HSBC Holdings provides funding for these investments.
units.translation_en: As part of its capital management process, HSBC seeks to maintain a balance between the composition of its own capital portfolio and its investments in subsidiaries. Based on this principle, HSBC Holdings provides funding for these investments.

units.source_text: 能⼒並無即時或可預⾒的障礙。於2025年內，集團旗下主要附屬公司在派付股息或償還貸款⽅⾯並無受到任何重⼤限制，此乃與集團資本計劃⼀
units.translation_target_text: There are no immediate or foreseeable impediments to ability. During 2025, the Group's major subsidiaries are not subject to any significant restrictions on the payment of dividends or loan repayments. This is in line with the Group's capital plan.
units.translation_en: There are no immediate or foreseeable impediments to ability. During 2025, the Group's major subsidiaries are not subject to any significant restrictions on the payment of dividends or loan repayments. This is in line with the Group's capital plan.

units.translation_target_text: To. In addition, there are no foreseeable restrictions on the expected distribution of dividends or payments by major subsidiaries. However, the subsidiary's ability to pay dividends or advance funds to HSBC Holdings will depend on a number of factors.

units.translation_target_text: At the end of each reporting period, HSBC Holdings reviews its investments in subsidiaries to identify indicators of impairment. When the carrying amount of an investment is greater than its recoverable amount, impairment is recognized. According to IAS 36,

units.translation_target_text: Long-term growth rate: The long-term growth rate is used to estimate the permanent value of free cash flow because the legal entity is of a long-term nature. The growth rate reflects the long-term inflation rate in the country or region where the investment is made.

units.source_text: 折現率：現⾦流之折現率乃根據各項投資的指定資本成本⽽釐定，此資本成本乃採⽤資本資產訂價模型及市場隱含權益成本計算。資本資產訂
units.translation_target_text: Discount rate: The discount rate for cash flows is determined based on the specified capital cost of each investment. This capital cost is calculated using the capital asset pricing model and the market's implicit equity cost. capital asset order

units.source_text: 價模型依賴多項可反映財務及經濟變數的數據，包括無風險利率及反映所評估業務內在風險溢價，以及槓桿⽔平。這些變數以市場對經濟變數
units.translation_target_text: The pricing model relies on a number of data that reflect financial and economic variables, including risk-free interest rates and premiums that reflect the inherent risk of the assessed business, as well as leverage levels. These variables are based on the market's response to economic variables
units.translation_en: The pricing model relies on a number of data that reflect financial and economic variables, including risk-free interest rates and premiums that reflect the inherent risk of the assessed business, as well as leverage levels. layout_variants.display_en: The pricing model relies on a number of data that reflect financial and economic variables, including risk-free interest rates and premiums that reflect the inherent risk of the assessed business, as well as leverage levels. These variables are based on the market's response to economic variables
